get.summary: Renames, moves, or reorders a playlist folder.
get.description: OpenSubsonic extension name `playlistFolders` (as returned by `getOpenSubsonicExtensions`). Updates a folder in the authenticated user's playlist organization: rename it, move it under another folder or to the root, or change its position among its siblings. At least one optional parameter must be supplied.

parameters.name: playlistFolderId
parameters.description: ID of the playlist folder to update.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The new human-readable name of the playlist folder.

parameters.name: parentId
parameters.description: ID of the new parent playlist folder. An empty value moves the folder to the root. Omit to leave the parent unchanged.

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: New position among siblings, as a client-assigned integer.

post.summary: Renames, moves, or reorders a playlist folder.
post.description:
OpenSubsonic extension name `playlistFolders` (as returned by `getOpenSubsonicExtensions`). Updates a folder in the authenticated user's playlist organization: rename it, move it under another folder or to the root, or change its position among its siblings. At least one optional parameter must be supplied.

Requires OpenSubsonic extension name `formPost` (as returned by `getOpenSubsonicExtensions`).

playlistFolderId.description: ID of the playlist folder to update.

name.description: The new human-readable name of the playlist folder.

parentId.description: ID of the new parent playlist folder. An empty value moves the folder to the root. Omit to leave the parent unchanged.

sortOrder.description: New position among siblings, as a client-assigned integer.
